subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! The letters thou didst send have all been honored with the glance of loving-kindness and attained unto hearing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی نامها که ارسال نمودی کل بلحاظ عنایت مشرف و باصغا فائز
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
